message:
feat(conformance): fall back to fixture expectations when live oracle is unavailable

Add graceful degradation in resolve_expected() for OracleMode::LiveLegacyPandas:
when capture_live_oracle_expected() returns HarnessError::OracleUnavailable and
the config flag allow_system_pandas_fallback is enabled, fall back to
fixture_expected(fixture) instead of propagating the error.

This is an environment guard that makes the conformance suite resilient in
environments where neither legacy nor system pandas is installed, by allowing
fixture-backed expectations as an explicit opt-in fallback. Without this flag
set, the error propagates as before (no behavior change for existing callers).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
